title: Duplicate secure_zero() could live in a shared header
description: lora_l2.c:44-50, ipv6_addr.c:32-37, lichen_l2.c:32-38 all define identical secure_zero() functions. Move to a shared header (e.g., lichen_util.h) as static inline to maintain call-site inlining while eliminating the duplication. Low priority since static inline is cheap to duplicate.
